LanguageData.DwarfFlavourPack_Settings_ResearchedTile: Researched Tunnel Cart Tiles Per Hour: {0}
LanguageData.ForbiddenItemsInLoadoutWarning: Warning: Some items in the loadout are forbidden and won't be hauled. They need to be unforbidden.
LanguageData.DFP_TunnelReform_NoWeightLimitTip: Tunnel caravans travel through underground passages on minecart rails. They are not limited by the weight of their cargo.
LanguageData.AbilityNeurotrainerUsed: {USER_labelShort} used tome to learn the {1} spell.
